phase_history.notes: Defined Nova Tune as a vocal mutation plugin in the Nova visual language, aimed at wave-bent vocal reshaping, pitch form transformation, and synthetic character design.
Planned a display-first mutation interface using the Nova Voice shell, but retargeted controls to Shift, Mutate, Glitch, Gender, Space, and Mix with mode-based vocal mutation.
Adopted the Nova Voice visual shell for Nova Tune and repositioned it as a futuristic vocal mutation surface with cosmic motion and preset-led exploration.
Scaffolded the JUCE processor, WebView editor, runtime UI, and preset browser for Nova Tune as a standalone vocal mutation plugin derived from the Nova suite shell.

framework_selection.rationale: WebView is the best fit for Nova Tune because the product depends on a visually rich mutation interface, animated spectral feedback, and a preset-led exploratory workflow that benefits from high-fidelity custom rendering.
